message:
feat: add LazyDb for deferred SQLite connection and lazy TUI startup

src/storage/sqlite.rs:
- Add LazyDb struct that defers database open until first use, cutting
  startup cost for commands that may never query the DB
- LazyDbGuard RAII type with Deref<Target=Connection> for ergonomic use
- LazyDb::from_overrides() resolves path from optional CLI args
- Thread-safe via parking_lot::Mutex; logs reason and duration on open
- LazyDbError enum for NotFound and OpenFailed with path context

src/lib.rs:
- Add lazy_db_to_cli_error() converter for LazyDbError → CliError
- Refactor run_stats(), run_context(), run_timeline() to use LazyDb
  instead of duplicated inline db-open-or-error boilerplate (removes
  ~60 lines of copy-pasted code across 3 functions)

src/ui/tui.rs:
- Defer db_reader and known_workspaces initialization to first use
  via ensure_db_reader() and ensure_known_workspaces() helpers
- TUI startup no longer opens the DB or loads workspaces eagerly,
  improving perceived launch speed
- known_workspaces converted from Vec<String> to Option<Vec<String>>
  with lazy population on first workspace filter interaction

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
